hero.badge: Dan Takara na NDC, Jihar Zamfara
hero.title: Jagoranci da Aka Gina akan Hidima
hero.subtitle: Gina Dama ga Kowane Al'umma a Jihar Zamfara.

vision.section_sub: Tsarin da ya hada kan dukkan fannoni don inganta al'ummominmu ta hanyar saka hannun jari mai hikima.

impact.section_sub: Ayyuka na gaskiya da ke kawo sakamako mai ƙarfi ga mutanen Jihar Zamfara.

programs.section_sub: Shirye-shirye da aka tsara don ƙarfafa, ilimantarwa, da ɗaukaka mutanenmu.

testimonials.title: Muryoyin Al'umma
testimonials.subtitle: Kada ku dogara da maganarmu kawai. Ku ji daga mutanen da rayuwarsu ta canza.

news.section_sub: Labarai, sanarwa, da bayanai daga tafiyar yakin neman zabe.

volunteer.title: Shiga Motsi
volunteer.subtitle: Ba za mu iya yin wannan kadai ba. Ku zama wani ɓangare na canjin ta hanyar sa-kai, fasaha, ko murya don taimaka mana gina Zamfara mafi kyau.

footer.tagline: Jagoranci da aka gina akan hidima. Gina dama ga kowane al'umma a Jihar Zamfara ƙarƙashin Majalisar Dimokraɗiyyar Najeriya (NDC).
footer.newsletter_sub: Kasance kana sanin sabbin shirye-shiryen al'ummarmu da ayyukan da muke yi.
